title: GME Stock Earnings Expectations and Historical Performance
text: GameStop has demonstrated a remarkable transformation from losses to profitability over recent quarters. Upcoming earnings expectations show consensus EPS estimate of 0.12 USD and consensus revenue estimate of 774.31M USD for Q1 2026. Historical performance shows the company moved from significant losses in Q1 2024 showing a loss of $0.12 EPS to consistent profitability with recent quarters showing positive earnings momentum. The company has beaten EPS estimates in 7 consecutive quarters. Over the past four quarters, GameStop averaged an EPS surprise of 1.16% and a revenue surprise of 0.15%. This contrasts sharply with fiscal year 2022 when the company posted a net loss of $313.1 million and adjusted EBITDA of negative $192.7 million. Analysts expect revenue to grow 14% over the next 12 months, an acceleration versus the last three years which showed a three-year revenue decline of 22.4%. However, sell-side analysts expect revenue to decline 14% per year on average during the next 3 years, while revenues in the Specialty Retail industry in the US are expected to grow by 5.7%. Revenue is expected to decline by 14% per year on average during the next 3 years. GameStop stock holds sell signals from both short and long-term Moving Averages.
